sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, value String, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, created_at) VALUES (1, 'test1', now()), (2, NULL, now()), (3, 'test3', now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY);
CREATE TABLE test_remote (remote_id Int32, remote_data String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY remote_id;
INSERT INTO test_remote SELECT id, value FROM mysql('localhost:3306', 'test', 'test_table', 'user', 'password') WHERE remote_id > 1;
SELECT * FROM mysql('localhost:3306', 'test', 'test_table', 'user', 'password') WHERE remote_id GLOBAL IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL);

INSERT INTO test_remote SELECT remote_id, remote_data FROM mysql('localhost:3306', 'test', 'test_table', 'user', 'password') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE remote_data = CONCAT(remote_data, ' updated') WHERE remote_id GLOBAL IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY);
SELECT remote_data FROM mysql('localhost:3306', 'test', 'test_table', 'user', 'password') WHERE remote_id IN (SELECT id FROM test_remote GROUP BY remote_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1);
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING count = 1;
CREATE TABLE temp_table (temp_id UInt32, data Float64) ENGINE = Memory;

INSERT INTO temp_table SELECT id, CAST(value AS Float64) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT remote_id, CAST(remote_data AS Float64) FROM mysql('localhost:3306', 'test', 'test_remote', 'user', 'password') WHERE remote_data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT temp_id, AVG(data) AS avg_data FROM temp_table GROUP BY temp_id HAVING avg_data > 0;
